mapper.sql: id, req_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, voice_type, text_content, synthesis_type, status, error_message, create_time, update_time, created_by, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE audio_file_record SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE req_id = #{reqId}
